name: codex-ui-adversarial-playwright
description: Codex Skill for exploratory UI testing, adversarial UI checks, accessibility scans, screenshots, and Playwright Test handoff.

scripts.install-browsers: npx playwright install chromium firefox webkit
scripts.check: node --check run.js && node --check scripts/run-audit.js && node --check scripts/setup.js && node --check lib/helpers.js && node --check lib/adversarial.js && node --check lib/report.js
